analysis.test: Three-part test for tort liability (art. 1240 C. civ.): fault + damages + direct and certain causal nexus […] the alleged fault and the claimed damages. Cassiopée must demonstrate that the acts attributed to Méridian Studios (exploitation of Bastille through Quiz Mania in particular) CAUSED CERTAIN and DIRECT damages to Cassiopée — and not merely hypothetical damages or damages resulting from another cause. Under [1] (Cass. com. 29 nov. 1976), trial judges […] enter a judgment for unfair competition establish the existence of a causal nexus […] the fault and the damages without reversing the burden of proof — which […] means that it is indeed for the […] (Cassiopée) to prove that nexus.
analysis.faits: Méridian Studios holds trademark Bastille No. 4449595 (Exhibit 2), commenced its business under that trade name (Kbis, Exhibit 1), placed an order with […] 2 as early as July 24, 2018 (Exhibit 7), and has been marketing the game on Amazon since at least January 2020 (Exhibit 6 Bis). Cassiopée asserts rights in Bastille and alleges damages resulting from that exploitation, including through Quiz Mania. The attestation of expert accountant Camille Lefèvre 3 records fluctuations in Bastille sales for 2020/2021 on Amazon and at […], but those fluctuations are those of Méridian Studios — they do not document any commercial loss suffered by Cassiopée. The response letter of October 5, 2021 (our exhibit) expressly notes that none of the three conditions for tort liability, including the causal nexus, has been established by Cassiopée. The judgment of the Tribunal judiciaire Paris in Cassiopée v. Méridian Studios (Adverse Exhibit 12) already adjudicated a prior dispute […] the […] parties, without Cassiopée having established any causally linked damages therein.
analysis.faille: Absence of affirmative evidence of a certain economic injury directly caused to Cassiopée by the acts of Méridian Studios: Cassiopée may attempt to introduce, in the course of the proceedings, quantified evidence (decline in sales of Carto Royale 4, loss of licensing revenue, lost profits on Tohu-Bohu) […] has not yet been filed into the record.
analysis.riposte: The alleged likelihood of confusion is insufficient to presume the causal link: a concrete demonstration of harm suffered by Cassiopée is required (Cass. com. [1]). Yet Cassiopée has submitted no accounting evidence of its own attesting to a decline in its sales or a loss of market share attributable to Méridian Studios. Moreover, the markets are distinct (physical board game vs. Tohu-Bohu mobile application), which […] severs any direct causal link. Finally, the TJ Paris 2020 (adverse Exhibit 12) already adjudicated a dispute […] the […] parties without finding any causally established harm.

autorites.title: Cass. com. 75-12.431, 1976-11-29
themes: lien de causalité avec la faute
autorites.summary: Les juges du fond […] prononcent une condamnation à […] des dommages-intérêts pour concurrence déloyale, établissent, sans renverser la charge de la preuve, l'existence d'un lien de causalité […] la faute et le préjudice dès lors qu'ils constatent la corrélation […] l'installation concurrente et la diminution du chiffre d'affaires du commerçant et écartent formellement d'autres causes de la baisse du chiffre d'affaires.

analysis.acte_referme: […] of compelled disclosure (art. 138 Code of Civil Procedure) or an order to produce Cassiopée's accounts for the relevant period, in order to demonstrate the absence of any correlation […] between Méridian Studios' activities and any adverse variation in Cassiopée's financial results; failing that, consolidated closing briefs emphasizing the complete absence of any adverse accounting exhibit establishing the injury and its causal nexus.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Cassiopée argues that Méridian Studios' exploitation of Bastille through Quiz Mania creates a likelihood of confusion with Carto Royale 4 and causes it direct commercial harm (diversion of customers, loss of goodwill), the causal link flowing mechanically from the established confusion-based wrongdoing.

statut_preuve.pourquoi: Cassiopée has produced no exhibit documenting a loss of revenue, erosion of clientele, or lost profits directly attributable to the acts of Méridian Studios. The affidavit […] concerns Méridian Studios's sales, not any injury suffered by Cassiopée. The letter of October 5, 2021 formally crystallizes the failure to demonstrate the causal link. Adverse Exhibit 12 (Tribunal judiciaire de Paris, 2020) confirms that Cassiopée likewise failed to establish that link in the prior proceedings.

analysis.these_adverse: Cassiopée argues that the tortious act of unfair competition — exploitation of Bastille through Tohu-Bohu by creating a likelihood of confusion with Carto Royale 4 — necessarily entails commercial injury to Cassiopée, the causal nexus flowing from the very nature of the unfair acts (diversion of potential customers, harm to goodwill). Relying on Exhibit 25 (Cass. com. 9 juin 2021) […] characterizes disloyal conduct of a nature to deceive consumer trust, Cassiopée contends that once the wrongful act is established, the injury and its causal nexus are necessarily implied. It also invokes Exhibit 12 (TJ Paris 2020) to demonstrate a context of direct and ongoing competition […] between the parties, rendering a cumulative economic injury plausible.

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation […] regarding variations in Bastille sales 2020/2021 (Amazon/[…])
pieces_adverses.contre: This exhibit documents Méridian Studios' own sales figures, not any loss suffered by Cassiopée — it is irrelevant to establishing Cassiopée's harm and the causal link thereto

pieces_adverses.piece: Screenshots of Quiz Mania and the Amazon Bastille product page (Exhibit 6 Bis)
pieces_adverses.contre: These exhibits establish the existence of exploitation but do not demonstrate a diverted customer flow to the detriment of Cassiopée, nor a quantified economic loss.

pieces_adverses.piece: Judgment, TJ Paris, 18 December 2020, Cassiopée v. Méridian Studios (Exhibit 12)
pieces_adverses.contre: That prior judgment did not find any causally established harm to Cassiopée; invoking it as evidence of an ongoing competitive context does not substitute for the absence of a quantified demonstration of the causal nexus in the present proceedings.

pieces_attendues: Income statements or tax returns (liasse fiscale) of Cassiopée for the period 2018–2022 demonstrating a decline in revenue
Amazon/distributor sales records for Carto Royale 4 over the same period, to establish a temporal correlation with Méridian Studios' activities.
Market study or expert report establishing the substitutability […] of Bastille/Tohu-Bohu and Carto Royale 4.
Certified public accountant's attestation or expert report quantifying Cassiopée's alleged injury and its connection to the acts of Méridian Studios
